predicates.name: is_legally_cohabiting_survivor_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person (the deceased). This background status may be directly asserted by a case.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_main_family_residence_at_opening_of_estate
predicates.description: The asset served as the main family residence of the deceased's household at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: is_household_contents_of
predicates.description: The first asset is household contents present in the second asset (the main family residence).

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or article 4.25.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The surviving legal cohabitant acquires usufruct over the asset as a legal consequence of the succession.
